description:
GIVEN a Postseason game is on the schedule
OR an All-Star Game is on the schedule
AND FOX broadcasters are assigned
AND the user's location is in the USA
AND a user is authorized for FOX MVPD
AND the game level entitledVideo = true
AND the feed level foxAuthRequired = true

steps.action:
WHEN the user views a FOX Postseason game tile
OR the user views a FOX All-Star Game tile
steps.result: THEN the MVPD pill does not display in the lower left corner of the game tile
